note: seq=25: HARDEN metrics exporter. Bulletproof fallback so a secondary-KPI timeout (e.g. 2.4M-row enrich_queue GROUP BY) can NEVER null business_total or flip the dashboard to unreachable=0 -- it re-fetches business_total in an isolated 8s-timeout query and serves it reachable. Re-fetch+verify+run once.

steps.note: seq=25: harden atlas_metrics_export.py (business_total never nulled by a secondary KPI timeout)

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,sys,urllib.request as u; base=sys.argv[1]; u.urlretrieve(base+'/scripts/atlas_metrics_export.py','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_metrics_export.py'); print('refetched metrics')" "$BRAIN_URL"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_metrics_export.py':'e067a03712dc68ef45a6df3ad6927f59c448ef91597264b16fb7bdaac0f62f46'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
